Through original programming, documentaries, and expert-led discussions, MHTN aims to increase awareness, provide valuable information, and encourage open conversations about mental well-being.

programme.title: Quo Vadis TV
programme.desc: Quo Vadis TV is committed to sharing the Biblical message in a way that makes Christian living practical, realistic, and attainable. Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie investigates a stagecoach holdup where white men disguised as Indians kill the driver and the guard and leave a lady for dead.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: At the Wells Fargo auction, a man and a woman bid vigorously on a destroyed suitcase.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: A wounded outlaw's brother kidnaps Slim and a vet and takes them to the gang's hideout to tend the injured man.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne assumes the identity of the actor Merritt to catch the leader of a band of thieves.

programme.title: Three Hours to Kill
programme.desc: The inhabitants of a small western community turn on Jim Guthrie (Dana Andrews) when he becomes the prime suspect for a murder he didn't commit. Before getting a chance to prove his innocence, Jim is driven from his home and into the wilderness, where he is left for dead. Despite the danger, he comes back years later, discovering that he's still a wanted man. But a kindhearted local named Chris (Dianne Foster) believes his story, and together they begin a desperate search for the true culprit.

programme.title: High Lonesome
programme.desc: At a sprawling Texas ranch, a mysterious young man nicknamed Cooncat (John Barrymore Jr.) tells rancher Horse Davis (Basil Ruysdael) an improbable story about a murder at a nearby trading post. His descriptions of the men he believes committed the crime, Smiling Man (Jack Elam) and Roper (Dave Kashner), fit those of two members of a rival family who were killed during a land fight years earlier. Another shooting draws Horse's future son-in-law, Pat Farrell (John Archer), into the mystery.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie rides with a bigoted general on a mission to quell a Sioux uprising.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Chester and Doc worry about Kitty's new friendship with outlaw Cole Yankton.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt tries to investigate a murder, but uncovers a violent bank-robbery plan instead.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess is unwittingly riding shotgun on a payroll stage that has been rigged to wreck; after the robbery, Jess trails the bandits to Billings.

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne waits out a winter with a cattle drive.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: Asked to be a candidate for district judge, Garth recalls a murder trial in which the defendant's brother (Clu Gulager) attempted to intimidate an entire town to prevent his sibling's execution.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An unscrupulous lawman compels a victim of circumstances to attempt murder.

programme.title: Appaloosa
programme.desc: Virgil Cole (Ed Harris) and his longtime friend and partner Everett Hitch (Viggo Mortensen) travel the 1880s Southwest, bringing justice to lawless towns desperate enough to hire them. In the mining town of Appaloosa, malevolent rancher Randall Bragg and his cronies ride roughshod over the frightened citizens. As Cole and Hitch work to end Bragg's reign of terror, an unconventional widow (Renee Zellweger) arrives, complicating the job and threatening their bond.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt and Chester search for a killer, but their only clue is a name.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: David poses as the fiance of a young woman with a persistent suitor, then discovers her admirer is a giant.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A stranger arrives on the McCain ranch claiming to be a friend of Lucas'.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: A mule driver's wife and child are kidnapped by outlaws.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess and Mort search for the men who robbed the Laramie bank and shot Mike; after finding two, they learn the third man may be in Chlorine, so Jess heads out alone.

programme.title: Campmeeting
programme.desc: With Perry Stone.

programme.title: Campmeeting
programme.desc: With Dr. Mike Murdock.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Two tough hired hands beat up Lucas and burn his ranch to get him to move off his land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is forced to give refuge to a young bank robber.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gives a once-famous marshal a chance for rehabilitation.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas has in-law trouble when his late wife's brother arrives in town.

programme.title: The High Chaparral
programme.desc: John protects a priest (Ramon Novarro) traveling with two nuns and a girl whose demented fiance wants her back.

programme.title: The High Chaparral
programme.desc: A man, disfigured by John during the Civil War, kidnaps Victoria to force a showdown in the high country.

programme.title: Ride Beyond Vengeance
programme.desc: Following an 11-year stay as a buffalo hunter in Kansas, Jonas Trapp (Chuck Connors) is finally on the way home to his wife, Jessie (Kathryn Hays), with the $17,000 he has saved up. Unfortunately, he happens to run into a group of bandits led by Brooks Durham (Michael Rennie) ; they beat him, brand him and steal all of his money. Now, returning home without a dollar to his name, Jonas finds Jessie has moved on to another man -- namely, Brooks Durham.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: This film update of the Maverick TV series finds the title cardsharp (Mel Gibson) hoping to join a poker contest with an impressive payoff. In order to enter, Maverick must first put up a large cash sum. He scams hopeful contestants Annabelle (Jodie Foster) and Angel (Alfred Molina) in a preliminary card game to win the money he needs, making enemies of both players. While trying to evade Annabelle and Angel, the crafty Maverick realizes a cunning marshal (James Garner) is also on his tail.

programme.title: Have Gun -- Will Travel
programme.desc: A courageous Russian peddler must face a ruthless band of gunslingers. With Richard Boone and Robert Blake.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bret establishes himself as a high-stakes gambler in a Western town.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A religious fanatic seeks violent "justice" against Chester for an imagined sin.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt brings three men suspected of an attack on an Indian woman back to Dodge to be identified.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Night Passage
programme.desc: A former Los Angeles lawman (Tom Selleck) becomes the new police chief of a small fishing town that holds dirty secrets.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Thin Ice
programme.desc: A police chief (Tom Selleck) lands in trouble with the town council after a shootout on the streets of Boston.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: Young men of the Pony Express brave harsh conditions. With Josh Brolin, Anthony Zerbe, Stephen Baldwin.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo

programme.desc: Ben Cartwright is the patriarch of an all-male Nevada ranching family. Set during and after the Civil War, "Bonanza" is the story of life on the family's thousand-acre spread, known as the Ponderosa, near Virginia City. Ben has his three sons, each with a different (and deceased) mother. Serious eldest son Adam hopes to follow in his father's footsteps; middle son Hoss is a gentle giant -- physically strong, but sometimes naive; and youngest son Little Joe is the most impetuous and romantic of the offspring.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett
programme.desc: Judge Glenda Hatchett presided over her self-titled courtroom show from 2000-2008. Now, she returns to the medium with "The Verdict." In the half-hour series, the Atlanta native and former juvenile-court judge rules over small-claims cases brought in front of her. Hatchett's courtroom isn't just about finding someone guilty, though. She also uses her experience dealing with young people and her tough-love approach to help send a message to out-of-control juvenile offenders to try to set them on the right track in their lives.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: On January 15, 2004, Michelle Nyce was found dead in a car wreck in New Jersey. Snowshoeprints led police to suspect foul play. Investigators discovered Michelle had been having an affair, and her millionaire husband, Dr. Nyce, became the prime suspect. Blood evidence in the garage and bathroom revealed he staged the crash. He was convicted of manslaughter and sentenced to 8 years, serving only 5.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: On January 13, 2009, 17-year-old Anna List was found dead in Michigan. Snowfall preserved crucial clues, including running shoe prints and a dusting of snow on her body. Investigators learned she had argued with her on-again, off-again boyfriend, Dominic Oyerinde. A search led to a claw hammer with Anna's blood on it, which Dominic used to kill her.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: On November 26, 1998, 25-year-old Corey Parker was found brutally murdered in her Jacksonville Beach apartment. Despite overwhelming forensic evidence, no leads emerged until 2000, when Robert Denney, her 17-year-old neighbor, became a suspect. A DNA sample from saliva he spat into a puddle matched evidence from the crime scene.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion

programme.title: Think Big
programme.desc: Children are the future -- and so are their inventions, which is why "Think Big" could be an important show. It features young inventors competing to see who can come up with the most-innovative invention. Each episode features two teams in the Think Tank -- a studio filled with art supplies and construction materials -- who brainstorm and choose materials before sketching, designing and building a prototype to be presented to a judge, who determines a winner. The champions earn bragging rights and the coveted Genius Cup.

programme.title: America's Heartland
programme.desc: Much of the food Americans eat is produced by farmers and ranchers in the country's heartland, but many people don't know how it's produced. "America's Heartland" provides information about the people and processes responsible for the availability of food and fuel across the country and around the world. The show's reporters and producers tell stories in topics that include farm families, consumer issues, animal welfare and crop sustainability. Some episodes also take the show abroad to countries such as Egypt and Taiwan to show the impact American agriculture has on the global economy.

programme.title: Murder, He Says
programme.desc: When a public opinion surveyor working in the mountain district town of Plainville goes missing, fellow surveyor Pete Marshall (Fred MacMurray) is sent as his replacement. Visiting the hillbilly family of Mamie Fleagle (Marjorie Main), Pete begins to suspect with horror that she and her two sons have murdered the surveyor. Pete then comes to believe that Mamie is slowly poisoning wealthy Grandma Fleagle, who has put a vital clue to her fortune in a nonsensical embroidered sampler.

programme.title: David and Bathsheba
programme.desc: King David and the beautiful Bathsheba's adulterous love risks David his throne, country and even the wrath of God. Told in occasional flashback, the film sees him conquer Goliath and lead his armies to victory before the prophet Nathan brings the word of Jehovah and His judgment, which sees David atone for his sins.

programme.title: Buchanan Rides Alone
programme.desc: Journeying from Mexico back home to West Texas, mercenary Tom Buchanan (Randolph Scott) takes a break for the night in the border town of Agry. He soon discovers that almost every resident -- from the crooked sheriff (Barry Kelley) to the shifty-eyed innkeeper -- is a member of the prominent Agry family. When Buchanan defends Juan de la Vega (Manuel Rojas), a young man about to be lynched for shooting the town drunk, he himself is accused of murder and must struggle to escape town alive.

programme.title: Taggart
programme.desc: Kent Taggart's family members, with their cattle stampeded, are killed by those who started it. In a fair gunfight, he kills the man's son responsible for it, and when he runs, a warrant is issued and a price is put on his head.

programme.title: Gunfight at the O.K. Corral
programme.desc: Lawman Wyatt Earp (Burt Lancaster) and gunfighter John "Doc" Holliday (Kirk Douglas) find themselves together again in Tombstone, Ariz., despite the tumultuous history between them. Earp comes to Arizona on a mission to bring the Clayton clan to justice. Meanwhile, Holliday becomes incensed with the decision of Kate Fisher (Jo Van Fleet) to turn him down in favor of another gunfighter (John Ireland), ultimately leading Holliday to join Earp's side in a confrontation with the Claytons.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: Aging rancher George Washington McLintock, a wealthy self-made man, is forced to deal with numerous personal and professional problems. Seemingly everyone wants a piece of his enormous farmstead, including high-ranking government men, McLintock's own sons and nearby Native Americans. As McLintock tries to juggle his various adversaries, his wife, who left him two years previously, suddenly returns. But she isn't interested in her husband -- she wants custody of their daughter.

programme.title: Ben-Hur
programme.desc: An enslaved Judean prince (Charlton Heston) meets his Roman betrayer (Stephen Boyd), a former friend, in a chariot race.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes is called in when a top secret document is stolen from the British Foreign Office.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Wyatt plans to avoid a shoot-out.

programme.title: The Tall Texan
programme.desc: Sheriff Chadbourne (Samuel Herrick) transports convict Ben Trask (Lloyd Bridges) to El Paso in a covered wagon. The wagon also carries sea captain Theodore Bess (Lee J. Cobb) and married couple Laura (Marie Windsor) and Jerry Niblett (Dean Train). The group comes upon a wounded Native American, banished by his tribe, who offers to lead them to gold. But then the tribe attacks the wagon, killing Jerry and wounding Chadbourne. Ben is freed to help, but the group's troubles have only begun.

programme.title: The Story of Jacob and Joseph
programme.desc: Biblical dramas show Jacob (Keith Michell) and his twin, and Jacob's 11th son, Joseph (Tony Lo Bianco), who was sold by his brothers.

programme.title: Paid Programming: Carshield -- Cars Have Changed
Taggart
programme.desc: Kent Taggart's family members, with their cattle stampeded, are killed by those who started it. In a fair gunfight, he kills the man's son responsible for it, and when he runs, a warrant is issued and a price is put on his head.

programme.desc: Aging rancher George Washington McLintock, a wealthy self-made man, is forced to deal with numerous personal and professional problems. Seemingly everyone wants a piece of his enormous farmstead, including high-ranking government men, McLintock's own sons and nearby Native Americans. As McLintock tries to juggle his various adversaries, his wife, who left him two years previously, suddenly returns. But she isn't interested in her husband -- she wants custody of their daughter.

programme.title: Rio Lobo
programme.desc: Union leader Cord McNally is protecting a routine gold shipment when his troops are attacked by Confederate forces. Not only does he lose the gold, but one of his strongest officers is killed in the raid. At the end of the Civil War, McNally learns that the raiders had help from the inside, and he vows to uncover the two traitors. After a chance encounter with one of the turncoats, McNally travels to the town of Rio Lobo and makes an unexpected discovery.

programme.title: Ben-Hur
programme.desc: An enslaved Judean prince (Charlton Heston) meets his Roman betrayer (Stephen Boyd), a former friend, in a chariot race.

programme.title: The Story of Jacob and Joseph
programme.desc: Biblical dramas show Jacob (Keith Michell) and his twin, and Jacob's 11th son, Joseph (Tony Lo Bianco), who was sold by his brothers.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Wyatt, Doc and Wyatt's brothers are charged with murder following the gunfight, but Curly Brocius and Johnny Ringo make plans to ambush them at the outlaws' funeral.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes and Watson uncover a plot to marry a beautiful music teacher for her inheritance.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Cisco Kid Returns
programme.desc: Pancho and the Kid attempt to prove that they did not kidnap the child they are protecting from a killer.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Ministry - Your Words Have Power with Joyce Meyer
programme.desc: Your words hold incredible power; today, Joyce reveals how the things you say can impact your life in profound ways.

programme.title: Word of God Ministries
programme.desc: Pastor James McMenis and his wife Chrissy are dedicated to winning the lost to Jesus and making disciples of the saved. Their goal is to bring clarity to the Word of God, making it life-applicable to people everywhere.

programme.title: The Catholic Mass
programme.desc: The Heart of the nation Sunday mass brings the beauty and traditions of the Catholic faith.

programme.title: Perry Stone
programme.desc: Religious teachings from Perry Stone.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Westerner
programme.desc: A rancher (Tim McCoy) and his buddy (Joseph Sauers) scare rustlers out of business.

programme.title: Bandits of El Dorado
programme.desc: The Durango Kid fakes a murder in the hopes of learning how fugitives escape across the Mexican border.

programme.title: The First Traveling Saleslady
programme.desc: An 1890s corset designer (Ginger Rogers) leaves New York with her secretary (Carol Channing) to sell barbed wire in Texas.

programme.title: Santa Fe
programme.desc: Three brothers become outlaws after the Civil War, while a fourth sibling goes to work for the railroad.

programme.title: Rio Lobo
programme.desc: Cord McNally searches for the two traitors whose treachery causes the loss of a dear friend and the defeat of McNally's unit.

programme.title: The Charge at Feather River
programme.desc: A frontier scout (Guy Madison) leads prisoners on a death mission to save a railroad and rescue two women.

programme.title: Hellfighters
programme.desc: Chance Buckman (John Wayne) has one of the most dangerous jobs in the world. He, his assistant Greg (Jim Hutton) and his team of skilled firefighters extinguish raging oil field fires all over the world, cheating death every time. Madelyn (Vera Miles), his wife, is tired of worrying about Chance every time he leaves, and their marriage is beginning to fall apart. As Chance falls for Greg's daughter, Tish (Katharine Ross), he must battle both the flames in the field and the ones in his heart.

programme.title: The First Traveling Saleslady
programme.desc: In 1897 New York, Rose Gillray (Ginger Rogers) struggles to keep her corset business afloat. When Rose suggests that singer Molly Wade (Carol Channing) wear her daring new corset in her revue, the show is shut down. In debt to steel manufacturer Jim Carter (David Brian), Rose declares she can sell steel wire to stubborn cattle ranchers in Texas and clear her debt. Along the way, Rose is joined by Molly, inventor Charles Masters (Barry Nelson) and cattle baron Joel Kingdom (James Arness).

programme.title: The Man Who Knew Too Much
programme.desc: On a family vacation in Switzerland, Bob (Leslie Banks) and his wife, Jill (Edna Best), become friendly with a man staying in their hotel. When the stranger is assassinated in their presence, the vacation turns dangerous. Before dying, the stranger passes along a secret to Jill. Then, to keep the couple silent, a band of foreign assassins kidnaps their daughter. Offered no help by the police, Bob and Jill hunt for their daughter as they try to understand the information that they have.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes unravels a murder involving a locked room with no key, a domestic disagreement and a set of animal tracks.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bells of Rosarita
programme.desc: Shortly after circus owner Sue Farnum (Dale Evans), her assistant, Gabby (George "Gabby" Hayes), and her late father's ex-partner, Slim Phillips (Addison Richards), accidentally interrupt the filming of a movie starring singing cowboy Roy Rogers (Roy Rogers), Slim is kidnapped. Sue suspects that William Ripley (Grant Withers), a crooked businessman who's trying to steal her circus, is behind the kidnapping. While Sue and Gabby set up a special performance, Roy tracks Slim's kidnappers.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Wyatt uses a stagecoach robbery to set factions of the Clanton gang against each other.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Wyatt plans to avoid a shoot-out.

programme.title: The Fighting Buckaroo
programme.desc: A cowboy (Charles Starrett) helps a friend who was framed for stealing cattle.

programme.title: Fort Osage
programme.desc: A scout (Rod Cameron) leads a wagon train through territory made hostile by a violated treaty.

programme.title: Santa Fe
programme.desc: Three brothers become outlaws after the Civil War, while a fourth sibling goes to work for the railroad.

programme.title: The Charge at Feather River
programme.desc: A frontier scout (Guy Madison) leads prisoners on a death mission to save a railroad and rescue two women.

programme.title: Hellfighters
programme.desc: Chance Buckman (John Wayne) has one of the most dangerous jobs in the world. He, his assistant Greg (Jim Hutton) and his team of skilled firefighters extinguish raging oil field fires all over the world, cheating death every time. Madelyn (Vera Miles), his wife, is tired of worrying about Chance every time he leaves, and their marriage is beginning to fall apart. As Chance falls for Greg's daughter, Tish (Katharine Ross), he must battle both the flames in the field and the ones in his heart.

programme.title: Gunsmoke in Tucson
programme.desc: An outlaw leader (Mark Stevens) and his lawman brother (Forrest Tucker) straddle a feud between farmers and cattlemen.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Sgt. Joe Friday (Jack Webb) and Officer Frank Smith (Ben Alexander) are Los Angeles Police Department detectives, and they need every bit of skill they have to solve their latest case: the shooting death of low-end bookie Miller Starkie. While initial evidence points to gangster Max Troy (Stacy Harris) and his trigger-man, Chester Davitt, Friday and Smith have trouble getting an indictment. Only through their own tenaciousness can they make sure justice is served.

programme.title: Barabbas
programme.desc: Epic biblical tale about the criminal who was released by Pontius Pilate in preference to Jesus, prior to the Crucifixion. The action follows Barabbas after his lucky escape, his return to crime and his subsequent recapture and imprisonment in the sulfur mines. Based on the novel by Swedish writer Par Lagerkvist.

programme.title: Texas Cyclone
programme.desc: A wandering cowpoke is shocked when the inhabitants of a Western community treat him like a long-lost friend.

programme.title: Fort Osage
programme.desc: A scout (Rod Cameron) leads a wagon train through territory made hostile by a violated treaty.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes and Watson try to trace an undetectable murder weapon.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bandit Queen
programme.desc: A young woman (Barbara Britton) becomes a masked avenger after gold-grabbers kill her Spanish parents in old California.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Cowboys believe that the townspeople of Ellsworth insulted Confederate Army Gen. Robert E. Lee.

programme.title: Paid Programming: Carshield -- Cars Have Changed
Dragnet
programme.desc: Sgt. Joe Friday (Jack Webb) and Officer Frank Smith (Ben Alexander) are Los Angeles Police Department detectives, and they need every bit of skill they have to solve their latest case: the shooting death of low-end bookie Miller Starkie. programme.title: Barabbas

The action follows Barabbas after his lucky escape, his return to crime and his subsequent recapture and imprisonment in the sulfur mines. Based on the novel by Swedish writer Par Lagerkvist.

programme.title: Prairie Schooners
programme.desc: Wild Bill Hickok (Bill Elliott) and his pal (Dub Taylor) take a wagon train through Indian country.

programme.title: Decision at Sundown
programme.desc: Hell-bent on revenge, flinty gunslinger Bart Allison (Randolph Scott) rides into a sleepy Western town with one goal in mind: to kill local roughneck Tate Kimbrough (John Carroll), who kidnapped his wife years ago. Both men have blood on their hands over the woman's eventual suicide. Allison and Kimbrough, wracked with guilt but boiling over with bloodlust, are set to face off for one final confrontation. Tensions mount as sunset approaches, and the townspeople must choose sides.

programme.title: Gunsmoke in Tucson
programme.desc: An outlaw leader (Mark Stevens) and his lawman brother (Forrest Tucker) straddle a feud between farmers and cattlemen.

programme.title: Escape From Fort Bravo
programme.desc: Captain Roper (William Holden) is the warden of a Union-run prison camp. A mysterious woman named Carla Forester (Eleanor Parker) arrives at the camp in order to free the Confederate prisoners, and things get complicated when Carla and the captain begin to fall for each other. In an effort to recapture the escaped prisoners, Roper has a run-in with a group of Mescalero Indians. In order to survive, he has to team up with his own prisoners to fight the Indians and wipe them out.

programme.title: A Face in the Crowd
programme.desc: Ambitious young radio producer Marcia Jeffries (Patricia Neal) finds a charming rogue named Larry "Lonesome" Rhodes (Andy Griffith) in an Arkansas drunk tank and puts him on the air. Soon, Rhodes' local popularity gets him an appearance on television in Memphis, which he parlays into national network stardom that he uses to endorse a presidential candidate for personal gain. But the increasingly petulant star's ego, arrogance and womanizing threaten his rise to the top.

programme.title: Strange Affair
programme.desc: Eminent psychiatrist Dr. Brenner (Erwin Kalser) invites cartoonist Bill Harrison (Allyn Joslyn) and his wife, Jack (Evelyn Keyes), to a banquet honoring war refugees. Bill volunteers to pick up fellow psychiatrist Dr. Baumler at the train station, but the man vanishes when he has Bill stop so he can use a pay phone. At the dinner, Bill and Jack are seated with Brenner's daughter, Freda (Nina Foch), and, to Bill's surprise, another man is introduced as Baumler -- who dies moments later.

programme.title: Decision at Sundown
programme.desc: Hell-bent on revenge, flinty gunslinger Bart Allison (Randolph Scott) rides into a sleepy Western town with one goal in mind: to kill local roughneck Tate Kimbrough (John Carroll), who kidnapped his wife years ago. Both men have blood on their hands over the woman's eventual suicide. Allison and Kimbrough, wracked with guilt but boiling over with bloodlust, are set to face off for one final confrontation. Tensions mount as sunset approaches, and the townspeople must choose sides.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol works quietly to save sleeping bears and return them to their cave; with the farmers out of town, Mayor Goodway calls the PAW Patrol to wrangle animals and control the chaos on a farmerless farm.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger tricks Katie into watching his kitties, an alarm system is set off and the PAW Patrol must rescue them; when Mayor Humdinger swipes one of Ryder's early inventions he must be rescued from an out-of-control flight.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: The heroic rescue pups, led by a tech-savvy boy named Ryder work together to protect the community; geared with special skills, gadgets and vehicles that help them on their rescue missions, the PAW Patrol is always up for the challenge.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When an ice floe carrying three penguins lands in the jungle, the pups must get the birds back to their frosty home; Daring Danny is locked out of the lighthouse Turbot left him to look after, with a freighter headed his way.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Yumi's Yummy Honey is all the buzz when it -- and her beehive -- go missing from her farm; Mayor Goodway's purse disappears, along with its precious cargo, Chickaletta.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: The pups leap into action when Digi and Tal's coconut catapult goes rampant and rockets off through the jungle targeting birds and monkeys.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger's birthday party goes horribly awry when Marshall Kitty gets trapped inside a life-sized piñata; Mayor Humdinger tries pushing fog into Adventure Bay, it's up to the PAW Patrol to find animals missing in the clouds and save the day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The Krusty crew get lazy when their moms take over the Krusty Krab; Patrick's new pet rock catches the eye of a mischievous rock collector.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick are sent to jail in the underground tunnels of Glove World, leading to a daring escape.

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Evolving from single-celled yellow organisms at the dawn of time, Minions live to serve, but find themselves working for a continual series of unsuccessful masters, from T. Rex to Napoleon. Without a master to grovel for, the Minions fall into a deep depression. But one minion, Kevin, has a plan; accompanied by his pals Stuart and Bob, Kevin sets forth to find a new evil boss for his brethren to follow. Their search leads them to Scarlet Overkill, the world's first-ever super-villainess.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: With Baby Corp's stinkless serum in enemy hands, Turtleneck Superstar CEO Baby issues a challenge to deliver a new formula by 5 p.m.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After struggling to relate to Shelby's interests, Lance tries to bond with her at a live-action role-play event; Lana tries to save the town garbage man's job when she finds out the mayor is replacing him with an automated garbage truck.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When two halves of an ancient medallion reunite, SpongeBob and his friends find themselves in the city of Atlantis, where the king gives them a tour.

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: Supervillain Gru, a man who delights in all things wicked, hatches a plan to steal the moon. Surrounded by an army of little yellow minions and his impenetrable arsenal of weapons and war machines, Gru prepares to vanquish all who stand in his way. However, nothing in his calculations and groundwork has prepared him for his greatest challenge: three adorable orphan girls who want to make him their dad.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel and Phoebe spot Chandler getting into a car with a mystery blonde; the friends reminisce about memorable moments.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: A blizzard causes Phoebe and Mike's wedding to spiral out of control; uptight Monica steps in as her friend's wedding planner, then drives everyone crazy.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Penny share secrets while Leonard is away; Wolowitz helps Raj get over his ex.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon's friendship is tested; Wolowitz's relationship with his mom causes a threat to his masculinity.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj designs a scavenger hunt that brings out the best -- and the worst -- in the whole gang.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon wants revenge after Amy ruins one of his favorite films; Leonard finds a way to get Penny to do anything; Stuart and Raj make online dating profiles.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy's relationship is tested when she takes a job at his university; a fight with Bernadette leaves Howard sleeping on Raj's couch.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler show Erica the tourist sights; they learn their baby's biological father might be an unsavory character; Joey begs Phoebe to teach him how to speak French before an audition.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel goes to a job interview at a restaurant and winds up sitting next to her current boss; Joey feels abandoned because Monica and Chandler are leaving.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross tries to win back Rachel's job with her former fashion employer; Phoebe tries to keep Joey from learning about his agent's death; Monica and Chandler make a horrifying discovery.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: One of the guys becomes offended when Rachel does not give him the same goodbye she gives the others.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The six friends prepare to say goodbye and embark on the next chapters of their lives; momentous events and last-minute surprises.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: When Manny and Luke baby-sit Lily so the adults can have a day to themselves, things go awry and Claire is convinced the boys are throwing a party.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire and the kids hide a stray dog from Phil; even though Jay says he doesn't want new friends, Gloria invites a new couple over; Cameron rents out the upstairs apartment to a Christian rock band.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire is convinced there's a mole in the company; Phil confronts Auntie Alice about stealing Gloria's hot sauce recipe; Jay teaches Joe how to be a handyman.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: With her usual stylist unavailable, Gemma decides to use Tina's hairdresser for an important work event; Malcolm discovers a connection with his new professor.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: While researching his family tree, SpongeBob discovers that one of his ancestors was a famous chili-slinger named SpongeBuck.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to find a way to get Squidward to visit him at his home; SpongeBob must search for a new pair of pants after his square pants shrink in the dryer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward's house becomes infested with a mail-order flea circus meant for SpongeBob; Squidward fakes being sick to get out of work, but his agony only begins when SpongeBob arrives to care for him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton steals Sandy's pelt to impersonate her; Plankton tries to launch himself into Mr. Krabs' head and misses his target.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: With Baby Corp's stinkless serum in enemy hands, Turtleneck Superstar CEO Baby issues a challenge to deliver a new formula by 5 p.m.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: After struggling to relate to Shelby's interests, Lance tries to bond with her at a live-action role-play event; Lana tries to save the town garbage man's job when she finds out the mayor is replacing him with an automated garbage truck.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick take Squidward on a plane to a tropical resort.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Doting father, horrible boss, rival to Plankton, money-loving owner of the Krusty Krab-- who could it be besides Eugene Harold Krabs?

programme.title: The SpongeBob SquarePants Movie
programme.desc: In this lively animated adventure, undersea oddball SpongeBob SquarePants and his starfish friend, Patrick, embark on a quest to clear the name of Mr. Krabs, the owner of the Krusty Krab restaurant, who has been framed for stealing the crown of ocean deity King Neptune. Leaving the familiar confines of Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob and Patrick venture out towards Shell City, where they hope to find Neptune's crown, but numerous obstacles stand (or float) in their way.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Now that Dracula has opened the Hotel Transylvania's doors to humans, things are changing for the better; however, Drac is secretly worried that his half-human grandson, Dennis, isn't showing his vampire side. So, while Mavis and Johnny are away, Drac enlists his friends to help him put the boy through a "monster-in-training" boot camp. But things really get batty when Drac's cantankerous, old-school dad pays an unexpected visit.

programme.title: Fight to Survive
programme.desc: Faith, determination and human spirit abound in "Fight to Survive," which recounts stories of people's deadly ordeals in the outdoors. Accompanying survivors back to where harrowing events occurred is rock-climber Craig DeMartino, who is featured in the premiere episode. His right leg was amputated below the knee after a climbing accident, but he continued in his sport. In 2006 he became the first amputee to free-climb the 3,200-foot face of Yosemite's El Capitan in one day. Other stories tell of sailor Steven Callahan clinging to a raft in the Atlantic, fisherman Dean Ririe trapped by a boulder in icy water, and hiker Ted Porter falling into a glacial crevasse.

programme.desc: Award winning Maroma Beach in Riviera Maya, Mexico; this unique beach offers luxury accommodations and powdered sands that never get hot; Bangkok and a ride on the Orient Express.

programme.title: Fight to Survive
programme.desc: Faith, determination and human spirit abound in "Fight to Survive," which recounts stories of people's deadly ordeals in the outdoors. Accompanying survivors back to where harrowing events occurred is rock-climber Craig DeMartino, who is featured in the premiere episode. His right leg was amputated below the knee after a climbing accident, but he continued in his sport. In 2006 he became the first amputee to free-climb the 3,200-foot face of Yosemite's El Capitan in one day. Other stories tell of sailor Steven Callahan clinging to a raft in the Atlantic, fisherman Dean Ririe trapped by a boulder in icy water, and hiker Ted Porter falling into a glacial crevasse.

programme.title: Siege of the Saxons
programme.desc: (1963) Dark ages adventure. King Arthur is murdered and usurped by his champion knight (Ronald Howard), so an outlaw (Ronald Lewis) seeks the mystic Merlin (John Laurie) to right the wrong.

programme.title: Cleopatra
programme.desc: (1963) Drama. Elizabeth Taylor plays the Egyptian queen who, to protect her realm, uses political guile and her body to woo Julius Caesar (Rex Harrison) and Mark Antony (Richard Burton).

programme.title: Anna
programme.desc: (2019) Luc Besson's action-thriller about a young Russian assassin, with Sasha Luss. A scout offers Anna an opportunity to become a model in Paris, but can she escape her links to the KGB?

programme.title: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: (2019) Partially animated action film based on a popular manga comic. Alita, a deadly cyborg brought back to life by a mourning scientist, sets out to discover her true identity.

programme.title: Sheroes
programme.desc: (2023) She-heroes: action-with-attitude. Three young women transform into a Generation Z version of Charlie's Angels to rescue their mate from a drug lord in Thailand. Cue guns and bikinis.

programme.title: Annie
programme.desc: (2014) Jamie Foxx stars in this reboot of the 1982 musical. Orphan Annie is transported to post-2008 recession-hit New York, where she becomes the ward of a germaphobe running for mayor.

programme.title: Rosaline
programme.desc: (2022) Literary romcom with Kaitlyn Dever and Isabela Merced. This is the story of Juliet's cousin who gets dumped by Romeo at the start of Shakespeare's play... and she's not too pleased.

programme.title: Midway
programme.desc: (2019) Roland Emmerich's sprawling, action-packed war drama about the Battle of Midway, a major turning point in World War II. Starring Ed Skrein, Luke Evans and Woody Harrelson.

programme.title: Daddy's Home
programme.desc: (2015) Comedy starring Mark Wahlberg, Will Ferrell and Linda Cardellini. A man's living happily with his wife and stepchildren - until the kids' biological dad swaggers back onto the scene.

programme.title: Daredevil
programme.desc: (2003) Superhero fantasy. Ben Affleck is a blind lawyer who turns vigilante by night. Jennifer Garner plays his lover and Colin Farrell the villain who endangers them both. Strong violence.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity: Next of Kin
programme.desc: (2021) Found-footage supernatural horror. A young woman visits an Amish community to make a documentary about her family. But there's a good reason why her mum got her away from there...

programme.title: Titane
programme.desc: (2021) Palm d'Or-winning body horror with Agathe Rousselle. A killer with a complex and sexual relationship with cars must dramatically transform to escape her past. Adults only.

programme.title: Stormbreaker
programme.desc: (2006) Family action-thriller with Alex Pettyfer and Mickey Rourke. British intelligence recruit a schoolboy to take on the man who killed his dad and is planning to unleash a deadly virus.

programme.title: My Spy
programme.desc: (2020) Family action comedy. A CIA agent (Dave Bautista) gets the run-around from a nine-year-old girl when he's sent to keep an eye on her family. With Chloe Coleman.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Forty: Classic US action drama series. The private detective spends his 40th birthday helping some local shopkeepers who are having problems with organised gangs. S7 Ep16

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Letters of Death: Classic US detective drama. A model doubts her sanity when anonymous messages begin turning up informing her that someone close to her could soon be murdered. S5 Ep9

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Locate and Destroy: Suave freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar embarks on another adventure. The Saint sets out on the trail of a former Nazi believed to be in South America. S5 Ep12

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Blackballed: Ken and Harry's close and loyal relationship comes under severe strain when Harry is arrested on suspicion of fraud. S7 Ep11

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Selected Target: Classic '70s police drama series. Regan and his team search for a family held hostage while the father of the clan is forced to help a multi-million-dollar fraud. S3 Ep1

programme.title: BattleBots
programme.desc: Round of 16: US robot combat series. The march towards the Giant Nut rages on as the final 16 bots fight for survival, but only four will survive to reach the quarter-finals. S6 Ep25

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Laura: Former New York Police Department Detective Sergeant Michael Doheny visits Hawaii to track down the killers of his late granddaughter. S7 Ep18

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Tears for All Who Loved Her: Detective drama. A mobster's wife arranges to have her husband murdered, then tries to seduce Crocker as a way of avoiding justice and revenge. S5 Ep10

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Flight Plan: Drama series about a suave troubleshooter. Sinister agents kidnap the sister of an ex-RAF pilot with the aim of forcing him into stealing a top-secret jet. S5 Ep13

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Whispering Grass: Boon's 'Girl Friday' Alex is in love with a man who has just been released from prison - but will he be able to avoid slipping back into a life of crime? S7 Ep12

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Sharpe's Mission: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. France 1813 - the war enters its final stages as the French formulate a desperate plan to capture Wellington's spymaster. S4 Ep3

programme.title: Goodwood Members' Meeting Highlights
programme.desc: All the highlights from the Goodwood Members' Meeting, a world-class motorsport meeting featuring high-speed track demonstrations and scintillating races.

programme.title: World Rally Championship Highlights
programme.desc: Round Five of the 2026 World Rally Championship is the Rally of Spain, with more than 300km of competition taking place across the Canary Islands.

programme.title: Millionaire Hot Seat
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson hosts the quiz where six players race to answer timed questions and hope to win one million pounds, but it all comes down to who's in the Hot Seat at the end. S1 Ep2

programme.title: Creed III
programme.desc: Boxing drama film sequel starring Michael B Jordan and Tessa Thompson, 2023. Adonis Creed faces more than just a fight when a childhood friend and former boxing prodigy resurfaces.

programme.title: Petrolicious - Soul Made
programme.desc: In a quiet corner of Milan, Pino and Milena La Rosa shape more than cars—they preserve philosophy. Lab Eleven isn't chasing trends; it's refining essence. From accident-free 993s to thoughtful, soulful builds, the focus is purity. No gimmicks, no theater. Just 911s, reborn with intention, balance, and an insistence that perfection lives not in polish—but in purpose.

programme.title: The Woodlanders
programme.desc: (1997) Emily Woof, Rufus Sewell and Cal MacAninch star in Phil Agland's sumptuous adaptation of Thomas Hardy's tragic tale of arranged marriages and thwarted love.

programme.title: Forty Guns
programme.desc: (1957) Western. Barbara Stanwyck stars as a cattle rancher who, with her hired guns, rules a town as if it were her own. But then a federal marshal (Barry Sullivan) arrives on the scene.

programme.title: The Violent Men
programme.desc: (1955) Cold War-influenced western starring Glenn Ford and Edward G Robinson. A smallholder stands alone against the expansionist plans and brutal tactics of a tyrannical rancher.

programme.title: Arabesque
programme.desc: (1966) Gregory Peck stars in Stanley Donen's spy thiller. An Oxford professor is unwittingly drawn into a deadly web of political intrigue. With Sophia Loren and Alan Badel.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: (2019) Adventure comedy sequel with Dwayne Johnson, Jack Black, Kevin Hart and Karen Gillan. The old school pals enter the Jumanji video game again to save their friend.

programme.title: Kingsman: The Secret Service
programme.desc: (2014) Action-comedy with Colin Firth, Taron Egerton and Samuel L Jackson. A London teenager is introduced to a secret society of immaculately dressed agents that exists to save the world.

programme.title: Holy Cow
programme.desc: (2024) Tender coming-of-age drama about a teenager who suddenly becomes responsible for his young sister. Can he make some serious cheese by making... cheese? In French/subs.

programme.title: Antlers
programme.desc: (2021) Dark, brooding horror with Keri Russell. A teacher tries to help a troubled pupil. She's in for a shock. The boy's bringing home roadkill for something that's locked in his basement.

programme.title: Dancing at Lughnasa
programme.desc: (1997) Drama. Meryl Streep stars in this tale of five sisters in rural 1930s Ireland whose lives are disrupted when their ageing missionary brother returns from Africa. With Michael Gambon.

programme.title: Gun Fury
programme.desc: (1953) Western. Rock Hudson stars as a California-bound settler who must ride 1500 miles to the Mexican border to rescue his fiancée (Donna Reed) after she's abducted by an outlaw.

programme.title: Men in Black: International...
programme.desc: ...Interview Special: Stars Chris Hemsworth and Tessa Thompson, director F Gary Gray and producers Walter Parkes and Laurie Macdonald talk about bringing the series back for a fourth part.

programme.title: Broken Lance
programme.desc: (1954) Western. A strict rancher (Spencer Tracy) treats his sons (Robert Wagner, Richard Widmark, Earl Holliman and Hugh O'Brian) as little more than employees, with fatal consequences.

programme.title: The Bedford Incident
programme.desc: (1965) Thriller. Sidney Poitier plays a photojournalist aboard a destroyer whose commander's obsessive hunt for a Soviet sub could plunge the world into nuclear war.

programme.title: Men in Black: International...
programme.desc: ...Interview Special: Stars Chris Hemsworth and Tessa Thompson, director F Gary Gray and producers Walter Parkes and Laurie Macdonald talk about bringing the series back for a fourth part.

programme.title: Men in Black: International
programme.desc: (2019) Fourth instalment of the sci-fi comedy franchise with Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Liam Neeson. An alien-obsessed rookie joins London's Men in Black team.

programme.title: Murder on the Orient Express
programme.desc: (2017) Kenneth Branagh is Belgian supersleuth Hercule Poirot in the star-studded version of Agatha Christie's murder-mystery classic, with Judi Dench, Johnny Depp and Penélope Cruz.

programme.title: Good Luck to You, Leo Grande
programme.desc: (2022) Drama starring Emma Thompson as a recently widowed, retired teacher who has a sexual bucket list she wants to get around to now that she has the time and, perhaps, even the energy.

programme.title: Widows
programme.desc: (2018) Steve McQueen's thriller follows the widows of some serious criminals as they mount a daring heist. The star-studded cast includes Viola Davis, Colin Farrell and Michelle Rodriguez.
